name: codex-pet-league
description: Codex App exclusive pet growth, real-time turn battles, and League account tools.

interface.shortDescription: Grow official Codex pets and run turn battles from Codex App.
interface.longDescription: Codex Pet League connects Codex App to the official shared alpha or a self-hosted League server for account-bound pets, hatch atlas uploads, Training Reports, random matchmaking, Friend Duel invite codes, real-time turn battles, replays, and leaderboard checks.
defaultPrompt: Set up my first League pet
Show my pet status and today's remaining XP
Draft a Training Report and prepare it for submission
Start random matchmaking and recommend a battle action
